description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs Haskell tests using Cabal. Include a global before_script that executes `ghc --version`, `cabal --version`, `cabal update`, `cabal install --enable-tests`, `cabal configure --enable-tests`, and `ulimit -n 256` for all jobs. Define four jobs—build-7.10, build-8.0, build-8.2, and build-latest—each placed in the default test stage, using the Docker images `haskell:7.10`, `haskell:8.0`, `haskell:8.2`, and `haskell:latest` respectively, and have each job run the command `cabal test`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
